title: Chelympics 2025 — initiation tournament rules + scoring + the boys' team names
html:
Chelympics 2025 — initiation tournament rules + scoring + the boys' team names

Source: 2025-05-09 Apple Note. The rulebook + score sheet for "Chelympics 2025" — a multi-event drinking tournament in Corvallis just before the May todos and the Austin departure. Direct successor to the 2023 beer ball rulebook.

TL;DR

  • Format: 7 events — Team Flip Cup → Card Building (3 stories) → Highest Dart Throw (2 throws/person) → Team Cup Pong (time trial) → Halftime: Charis leads ritual → Beer Ball Tournament (using the 2023 rulebook) → Face Frenzy → Karaoke.
  • Scoring: 1st = 5pts, 2nd = 4pts, ..., 5th = 1pt. Penalties: -1 for falling, -2 for throwing up. Bonuses: +1 best photos (3 photos), +1 best sportsmanship.
  • Team names + karaoke songs: Dove (22, "AG Thriller"), Francis (16, "We Are Young"), Schlong (17, "Baby Shark"), Charis (21, "Tequila"), La Croix (17, "American Girl").
  • Penalty log mid-event: Charis -0.5 (Charis fell), Francis -1 (Owen fall), Luke -1 ("cum mustard"), Dove +1 ("grab cocking" — Hemmy).
  • Best sportsmanship: Charis +1.
  • Buy-in: 1 beer + 1 shot per person.

Pattern observed

This is Yahir-as-event-architect mode (same instinct as the beer ball rulebook and the Corvallis Crypto Club organization). He structures social rituals: scoring system, halftime ritual, written rules, photo bonus, named karaoke selections. The crew — Dove, Francis, Schlong, Charis, La Croix — gets memorialized.

This is the last documented gathering of the Corvallis crew before Austin. ~3 weeks later he writes the Brotein Austin prep todos. ~3 months later he leaves.

Open questions

  • Who are the human names behind the team names? (Charis, Owen, Luke, Hemmy named directly. Dove, Francis, Schlong, La Croix unclear.)
  • "AG Thriller" — Aggies + Thriller? OSU mascot themed?
  • Was there a Chelympics 2024? Or is this the inaugural?
  • Did Yahir win? (Doesn't say in the note.)

Related
